heading: EJSON.parse()
body:
Parses the provided [EJSON](manual/reference/mongodb-extended-json) string and converts it to a
JavaScript object.

```typescript
EJSON.parse(ejsonString: string): object
```

| Parameter   | Type   | Description                                                    |
| ----------- | ------ | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| ejsonString | string | A serialized string representation of an Extended JSON object. |
